task_completion.description: Verify that the Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface (map, main menu, or dashboard) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the app's Settings menu is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Settings screen of the Sygic app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Privacy settings section is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen or dialog titled 'Privacy', 'Privacy settings', 'Information & Privacy', or similar is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the setting for product improvement or analytics collection is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific setting, toggle, or checkbox related to 'Product improvement', 'Help improve Sygic', 'Usage statistics', 'Analytics', or 'Consent' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the product improvement data collection setting is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox for the product improvement/analytics setting is clearly in the OFF, disabled, or unchecked state.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI interactions (taps, scrolls) rather than terminal windows or command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the actual Sygic app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI belongs to the Sygic GPS Navigation app (com.sygic.aura), not a web browser searching for instructions, a text editor, or the Android system settings.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical sequence of UI screens showing navigation from the main app screen to the privacy settings, without sudden jumps indicative of adb intents or direct database edits.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura). The expected final state is that the setting for analytics or product improvement data collection is toggled OFF (disabled). Look for settings related to 'Product improvement', 'Help improve Sygic', 'Usage statistics', or 'Consent' within the app's privacy settings.
